scripts.borrowed_pattern: Shock hook borrowed from top-performing posts that open with a surprising statistic — triggers curiosity and stops the scroll instantly.

scenes.visual: Close-up of a calculator showing a large number, then cut to contractor looking stressed
scenes.on_screen_text: Why your renovation costs 40% more than it should

scenes.visual: Split screen: messy quote document vs clean itemized breakdown
scenes.on_screen_text: Hidden markups most contractors won't show you

scenes.visual: Camera pans across a beautifully completed kitchen renovation
scenes.on_screen_text: Same quality. Fair price. No surprises.
Get your free estimate today → Link in bio

scripts.caption: Stop overpaying for renovations. We believe in total price transparency — no hidden fees, no markups. See how we're different. 🏗️
scripts.thumbnail_idea: Bold text on dark background: '40% less' with a before/after arrow pointing to a stunning room reveal

scripts.concept_title: Day in the Life: Project Manager Edition
scripts.borrowed_pattern: POV/Day-in-life format — creates authentic connection and humanizes the brand. Talking head builds trust faster than any ad copy.

scenes.visual: POV shot: walking through an active construction site at 7am
scenes.on_screen_text: POV: You're managing a 3-floor renovation in Tashkent

scenes.visual: Quick cuts: checking materials, reviewing blueprints, talking to workers, measuring walls
Client walkthrough — client smiling and nodding approvingly
Finished room reveal with client visibly happy
scenes.on_screen_text: Your renovation deserves this level of care 👇

scripts.caption: A day on site — because you deserve to see exactly how your project gets built. Transparency isn't a promise. It's our process. 🏠✅
scripts.thumbnail_idea: Candid shot of PM reviewing blueprints on site, text overlay: 'Day 1 vs Day 21'

scripts.borrowed_pattern: Educational question-hook format — positions brand as expert, delivers immediate value, and earns trust before the CTA. High save/share rate.

scenes.on_screen_text: Ask your contractor these 3 questions BEFORE signing

scenes.visual: Text appears on screen as each question is spoken
scenes.on_screen_text: 1. Do you provide itemized material costs?
2. Who specifically will be on-site daily? 3. What's your defect warranty?
We answer all 3 — and put it in your contract 📋

scripts.caption: Save this before your next renovation. Three questions that separate trustworthy contractors from the rest. 📌
scripts.thumbnail_idea: Bold text: '3 Questions' on a clean white/dark background with a checkmark emoji, no face visible — creates intrigue
